questions.question: Who is Rakesh and where does he live?
questions.answer: Rakesh is a young boy who lives with his grandfather in Mussoorie.

questions.question: Why did Rakesh’s parents send him to Mussoorie?
questions.answer: They sent him to Mussoorie so that he could attend school.

questions.question: Where did Rakesh buy the cherries?
questions.answer: Rakesh bought cherries from the Mussoorie bazaar.

questions.question: What did Rakesh decide to do with the cherry seed?
questions.answer: He decided to plant the cherry seed in the garden.

questions.question: Who suggested that Rakesh plant the seed?
questions.answer: His grandfather suggested that he plant the seed.

questions.question: What was the first sign that the cherry seed had started growing?
questions.answer: A small twig appeared in the garden.

questions.question: How did Rakesh protect the small plant?
questions.answer: He watered the plant and placed pebbles around it.

questions.question: What damage did the goat cause to the cherry plant?
questions.answer: The goat ate all the leaves of the cherry plant.

questions.question: How was the cherry plant damaged again later?
questions.answer: A woman cutting grass accidentally cut the plant with her scythe.

questions.question: How did the cherry plant survive these difficulties?
questions.answer: It survived by growing new shoots and leaves.

questions.question: Which insect did Rakesh see on the cherry tree?
questions.answer: He saw a bright green praying mantis.

questions.question: Why did Rakesh remove the caterpillar from the tree?
questions.answer: He removed it to protect the leaves from being eaten.

questions.question: Which season helped the cherry tree grow faster?
questions.answer: The monsoon season helped the tree grow faster.

questions.question: What appeared on the tree after a few years?
questions.answer: A pale pink blossom appeared on the tree.

questions.question: How did Rakesh and his grandfather react when they saw the blossom?
questions.answer: They admired it with happiness and wonder.

questions.question: What fruit later grew on the cherry tree?
questions.answer: Small cherries grew on the tree.

questions.question: Which birds came to eat the cherries?
questions.answer: Bulbuls and scarlet minivets came to eat the cherries.

questions.question: Why did Rakesh feel proud of the tree?
questions.answer: He felt proud because he had planted and cared for it himself.

questions.question: What does the cherry tree symbolize in the story?
questions.answer: It symbolizes patience and growth.

questions.question: What lesson does the story teach about nature?
questions.answer: It teaches that caring for nature brings growth and beauty.

questions.question: Who wrote the story about the cherry tree?
questions.answer: Ruskin Bond wrote the story.

questions.question: Where does the story mainly take place?
questions.answer: The story takes place in Mussoorie in the Himalayan foothills.

questions.question: What quality did Rakesh show while caring for the tree?
questions.answer: He showed patience and responsibility.

questions.question: What did Rakesh learn from growing the tree?
questions.answer: He learned the value of patience and caring for nature.

questions.question: What is the main message of the story?
questions.answer: The story shows that patience and care can help life grow and flourish.
